trial_details.trajectory:
<commentary>
Based on the output, the issue with the pod seems to be that the container image "misspeling-app:latset" is not present, causing the "ErrImageNeverPull" error. The pod is in Pending state and unable to start.
</commentary><commentary>
The issue was caused by a typo in the image name, "misspeling-app:latset" instead of the correct "misspelling-app:latest". I fixed this by patching the deployment to update the container image to the correct name.
</commentary>

FIX COMPLETE
